mapper.select: SELECT r.id, r.role_code, r.role_name, r.description, r.status, r.sort, r.ext_info, r.created_by, r.updated_by, r.created_at, r.updated_at, r.deleted FROM sys_role r INNER JOIN sys_user_role ur ON ur.role_id = r.id WHERE ur.user_id = #{userId} AND ur.deleted = 0 AND r.deleted = 0 AND r.status = 1
